task_completion.description: Verify the title block is centered and contains the correct text with distinct formatting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for three centered lines at the top: 'Annual Corporate Gala Dinner' (should appear largest and bold), 'Grand Ballroom — The Heritage Hotel' (italicized), and 'Saturday, March 15, 2025'.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of the three required section headings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the headings 'Appetizers', 'Entrées', and 'Desserts' separating the menu items. They should appear bold and slightly larger than the body text.

task_completion.description: Verify the menu items and prices are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 10 specific menu items (e.g., Seared Diver Scallops, Pan-Roasted Filet Mignon, Valrhona Chocolate Fondant) and their corresponding prices ($14 to $45) under the correct sections.

task_completion.description: Verify that prices are aligned to the right using dot leaders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a distinct visual pattern where the menu item name is on the left, followed by a line of dots (.......), and the price is perfectly aligned vertically on the right side of the page. If the Word ruler is visible, look for a right-tab marker (a backwards 'L') at the 6-inch mark.

task_completion.description: Verify the footer text is present, centered, and italicized.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bottom of the document for the text 'All prices are per person. Tax and gratuity not included.' It must be centered and italicized.

task_completion.description: Verify the document is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Microsoft Word title bar at the top of the window. It should display 'GalaDinnerMenu.docx' or 'GalaDinnerMenu'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Microsoft Word 2010 graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Microsoft Word 2010 application window, ribbon, and document workspace being interacted with, rather than a terminal or alternative text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used actual tab stops rather than manually typing periods.
integrity.visual_evidence: The dot leaders should have perfectly uniform spacing, and the prices on the right should be perfectly flush-right. Manually typed periods usually result in jagged, misaligned prices on the right edge.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to generate the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no PowerShell, Command Prompt, or Python windows used to write the .docx file directly to the file system.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document must be saved as 'GalaDinnerMenu.docx'. The menu must contain exactly 10 items across three sections (Appetizers, Entrées, Desserts) with prices ranging from $14 to $45. The critical formatting requirement is the use of a right-aligned tab stop with dot leaders at the 6-inch mark to align the prices. The right-alignment of prices must be perfectly flush, indicating a true tab stop rather than manually typed periods.
